expected_action: Package-local commands are compliant when invoked through Bun rather than npm, yarn, or pnpm.
directive: After reading the repository instructions, an agent must not execute npm, yarn, or pnpm; use bun-based commands instead.

content: Run the package-local script through Bun cwd support.

content.text: I will read the package scripts before running the package-local command through Bun.
I will use Bun as the runtime and package-script launcher.

name: Bash
content: Bun-managed package command completed or showed local help/failure.
